synopsis: Robert Woodward, along with James Linton and Kirk Lyons, filed complaints against Western Carolina Presbytery alleging it erred when it did not find a strong presumption of guilt against TE Craig Bulkeley and when it failed to properly investigate grievances due to procedural failures and alleged denial of due process to the accusers. The cases were combined with Case 2009-5 (TE Martin Payne complaint) due to similar circumstances.
